base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of powerup_whip_chain — a pickup_item (power_item) from 1986 castlevania. Chain whip powerup — upgrades whip level 1. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Chain whip powerup — upgrades whip level 1→2 (leather→chain); 2-frame sparkle. May also be rendered as MorningStar for level 2→3 upgrade
